dataset.description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

desc: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).
goal: Study the impact of different venues on match outcomes, analyzing the win rates for home and away teams and their relationship with individual player performances.
name: Visual Analytics System cricket_goal2_1742656894

plan.path: The user starts with View 1 to establish home venue associations through the team-venue matrix. Selection of key venues filters View 2's heatmap showing home/away win rate comparisons. Brushing on high-delta venues triggers View 3's fantasy points distribution analysis, where outlier clicks reveal individual performance details. Finally, View 4 shows how boundary statistics correlate with victory margins at selected venues.

effect.description: Selects target venue(s) and filters downstream views

visualization.description: Matrix showing venue-team associations with checkmark indicators for verified home grounds
encodings: x: team (nominal) from teams split into distinct values
color: checkmark indicator via condition (aggregated home venue matches)

effect.description: Highlights exact win percentages in tooltip

visualization.description: Heatmap showing home vs away win rates per venue
encodings: x: outcome_type (home/away) derived from V1 associations
color: win_rate (quantitative) with blue-red diverging scheme

effect.description: Shows player match performance timeline in View 4

visualization.description: Box plots showing fantasy points distribution per venue
Scatterplot showing boundary impact relationships with trend lines

data.reason: The current color scale 'divergingRdBu' is not specified. A specific diverging color scheme should be chosen to support the data ranges.
data.requirement: Use a diverging color scale instead of 'divergingRdBu'. Choose a diverging color scheme that supports specific data ranges.

interaction.reason: Interactions are missing for all visualizations. Interactions should be added to enhance user interaction and data exploration.

visualization.reason: The current visualization is a heatmap, which is suitable for showing the overall distribution and main patterns of data.
visualization.requirement: Display the overall distribution and main patterns of data.

visualization.reason: The current visualization is a bar chart, which is suitable for supporting data filtering and drill-down analysis.
visualization.requirement: Support data filtering and drill-down analysis.

visualization.reason: The current visualization is a scatter plot, which is suitable for displaying detailed information about specific data items.
visualization.requirement: Display detailed information about specific data items.

visualization.reason: The current visualization is a scatterplot matrix, which is suitable for understanding how venue-specific boundary counts correlate with match outcomes.
visualization.requirement: Understand how venue-specific boundary counts correlate with match outcomes.

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW venue_teams_view AS SELECT venue, teams FROM match_summary
sqls.name: venue_teams_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW match_outcome_view AS SELECT match_id, venue, outcome_winner, teams FROM match_summary
sqls.name: match_outcome_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW player_performance_view AS SELECT player, venue, fantasy_points, match_id FROM detailed_player_data WHERE match_id IN (SELECT match_id FROM match_outcome_view)
sqls.name: player_performance_view

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW boundary_impact_view AS SELECT total_fours, total_sixes, outcome_by_runs, match_id, venue FROM match_summary
sqls.name: boundary_impact_view

tasks.method: Compute home team inference through venue-city/team string matching. Visualize as a table/matrix (vennue rows ✕ team columns) with checkmark indicators for verified home venues.
tasks.objective: Establish home venue associations for teams as foundation for win rate calculations

tasks.method: Calculate home/away win ratio per venue. Use heat matrix (V1 design) with venues as rows, two columns for home/away win rates, color gradients (+ red/blue diverging) to show dominance patterns.
tasks.objective: Compare team success patterns across venues while maintaining home-away distinction

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates (V5) showing venue-specific performance: Normalized axes for player runs, strike rate (batters), economy rate (bowlers) and team win rate. Color encodes venue clusters.
tasks.objective: Identify player performance patterns contributing to venue-specific outcomes

tasks.method: Small multiples of box plots per venue showing fantasy points distribution. Linked via I1 interaction - selecting a venue highlights outlier players in context view.
tasks.objective: Analyze individual performance consistency/variability across venues

tasks.method: Scatterplot matrix with aggregated venue stats: Four/sixes ratios vs win margin (+symbol size for win frequency). Trend lines show boundary impact relationships.
tasks.objective: Understand how venue-specific boundary counts correlate with match outcomes
